verses.text: We sent Timothy to establish you, 'that no man should be moved by these afflictions.' Steadying. He sent help lest trials shake them.
We sent Timothy to establish you, 'that no man should be moved by these afflictions.' Steadying. He sent help lest trials shake them.
We sent Timothy to establish you, 'that no man should be moved by these afflictions.' Steadying. He sent help lest trials shake them.
We told you we should suffer; I sent to know your faith, lest the tempter had tempted you. Anxious care. He feared the enemy might overthrow them.
We told you we should suffer; I sent to know your faith, lest the tempter had tempted you. Anxious care. He feared the enemy might overthrow them.
Timothy brought good tidings of your faith and love; 'now we live, if ye stand fast.' Glad news. Their steadfastness gave him new life.
Timothy brought good tidings of your faith and love; 'now we live, if ye stand fast.' Glad news. Their steadfastness gave him new life.
Timothy brought good tidings of your faith and love; 'now we live, if ye stand fast.' Glad news. Their steadfastness gave him new life.
What thanks can we render for the joy ye bring? praying to see your face. Thankful joy. He overflows with gratitude for them.
What thanks can we render for the joy ye bring? praying to see your face. Thankful joy. He overflows with gratitude for them.
The Lord make you increase in love, 'to the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness.' Growing love. He prays they be confirmed in holiness.
